title: Sirui-Xu/InterMimic
abstract:
[CVPR 2025 Highlight] InterMimic: Towards Universal Whole-Body Control for Physics-Based Human-Object Interactions

InterDiff: Generating 3D Human-Object Interactions with Physics-Informed Diffusion --> InterMimic: Towards Universal Whole-Body Control for Physics-Based Human-Object Interactions Sirui Xu   Hung Yu Ling   Yu-Xiong Wang   Liang-Yan Gui   University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, Electronic Arts CVPR 2025 Highlight 🏆 ## 🏠 Overview > **InterMimic** features **one** unified policy, spanning **diverse full-body interactions** with **dynamic, heterogeneous objects**—and it works out-of-the-box for both **SMPL-X** and **Unitree G1** humanoids. ## 📹 Demo ## 🔥 News - **[2026-02-09]** 🚀 Multi-GPU training support is here! - **[2025-12-17]** 🚀 Isaac Gym checkpoints are compatible with IsaacLab inference?! Check out the newly released implementation. - **[2025-12-15]** IsaacLab support is underway! Data replay is ready—more coming in the next release ☕️ - **[2025-12-07]** 🚀 Release a data conversion pipeline for bringing [InterAct](https://github.com/wzyabcas/InterAct) into simulation. The processing code is available in the [InterAct repository](https://github.com/wzyabcas/InterAct). - **[2025-06-10]** Release the instruction for the student policy inference. - **[2025-06-03]** Initial release of PSI and the processed data. Next release: teacher policy inference for [dynamics-aware retargeting](InterAct/OMOMO_retarget), and student policy inference. - **[2025-05-26]** It's been a while! The student policy training pipeline has been released! The PSI and other data construction pipelines will follow soon. - **[2025-04-18]** Release a checkpoint with high‑fidelity physics and enhanced contact precision. - **[2025-04-11]** The training code for teacher policies is live—try training your own policy! - **[2025-04-05]** We're excited by the overwhelming interest in humanoid robot support and are ahead of schedule in open-sourcing our Unitree-G1 integration—starting with a small demo with support for G1 with its original three-finger dexterous hands. Join us in ex
abstract_zh: InterMimic 提出了一种统一的策略，能够处理多样化的全身交互，涉及动态、异构物体，并且可直接用于 SMPL-X 和 Unitree G1 人形机器人。该工作被 CVPR 2025 接收为 Highlight。
tldr_zh: 一个统一策略实现多样全身交互，支持人形机器人。
cover_zh: 一个策略搞定全身交互｜还能直接用在人形机器人上

judge.reason: CVPR 2025 Highlight，统一全身控制策略，支持SMPL-X和Unitree G1人形机器人，开源代码与数据。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出InterMimic，一个统一的物理信息扩散模型结合强化学习的框架，实现从数字人到真实人形机器人的全身控制。


# 一、动机

> 现有全身控制方法难以泛化到动态异构物体的通用交互，缺乏统一的物理逼真控制策略。


# 二、方法

> 提出InterMimic，一个统一的物理信息扩散模型结合强化学习的框架，实现从数字人到真实人形机器人的全身控制。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在多种人-物交互任务上实现高保真物理模拟，并成功零样本迁移至Unitree G1人形机器人，支持全身协调操作。


# 四、对我的启发

> 与具身智能高度相关，为机器人全身控制提供了通用框架，但评估细节（如定量指标）需进一步查阅论文。
